steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The underlined portion identifies the critical problem: standard dyeing would “run counter to the ecological promise” of sustainable pellicles. This problem is what necessitates a different coloring approach.

steps.title: Match the signal to its function
steps.content:
The underlined portion presents a problem consideration that motivated the researchers to employ an alternative approach to coloring—exactly what choice D describes.

The other answers either claim the underlined portion shows how they solved it (rather than identifying what the problem is), or discuss the wrong comparison.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
